benefits.description: Lost 45 lbs from 225 lbs to 180 lbs since late July using every-other-day dosing after previous once-weekly protocol showed no results.
No longer experiencing skin reactions (previously had severe skin side effects with once-weekly dosing).

side_effects.description: Skin was on fire with once-weekly 12mg dosing back in Feb/April.

protocol_notes: Previously tried 12mg once weekly in Feb/April with poor results and severe side effects. Stopped for couple months, then started 1mg every other day. Describes current protocol as 'wonderful' with excellent results.
